# Grant Foster Full Context

## Profile
Grant Foster is an AI staff engineer focused on applied AI systems, distributed infrastructure, and product execution.

## Core Work Areas
- Bittensor operations and ecosystem tooling
- Agentic backend systems
- AI trading and automation experiments
